meta.name: ActionIQ
meta.note: ActionIQ was acquired by Uniphore in December 2024. The blog URL now 301-redirects cross-host to https://www.uniphore.com/actioniq/, an HTML landing page with no resolvable RSS/Atom feed. Historical ActionIQ blog content is no longer publicly accessible at the original URLs.

feeds.note: 301 redirect to Uniphore landing page; no RSS/Atom feed resolves and no ActionIQ posts to scrape
